entries.definition:
s–b–b to pour out; remnant; a group; love, to be in love. Of
this root, three forms occur five times in the Qurʾan: صَبَّ sabba
three times; يُصَبُّ yuṣabb once and صَبًّا sabban once.

صَبَّ sabba u [v. trans.] to pour out liquid and the like (44:48) ثُمَّ
صُبُّوا فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْحَمِيمِ then, pour scalding water over his head
as punishment.

صَبّ sabb [v. n. used adverbially for emphasis] pouring out
liquid and the like (80:25) أَنَّا صَبَبْنَا الْمَاءَ صَبًّا We pour down water
torrentially.
